tools.name: search
tools.description: Search SAGE Infinite Search when ordinary product search is unlikely to find a rare, vintage, discontinued, one-of-one, local, secondhand, or poorly identified item. Returns only public independent-retailer candidates with fresh positive source evidence. When results is empty, you must show recovery

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch one exact SAGE result by the opaque id returned from search. Rechecks the indexed source and returns its retailer, URL, price, availability evidence, freshness, and safety limits. Read-only; never use an id that did not come from search.

tools.name: search_local_inventory
tools.description: Search SAGE public local inventory across independent retailers. Returns connected SAGE storefront matches in items and evidence-gated unusual inventory from SAGE's wider public retailer index in networkItems. Supports caller-supplied metro and long-tail category filters. When resultCount is zero, y

tools.name: get_public_store_inventory
tools.description: Read public, agent-readable inventory for one SAGE storefront. Use this when you know the shop slug and need current public item records.

tools.name: get_public_inventory_item
tools.description: Read one public SAGE inventory item by shop slug and item slug. Returns item details, stock freshness, readiness, provenance, and safe next action.

tools.name: find_inventory_alternatives
tools.description: Find read-only alternatives for a SAGE inventory item when it is out of stock, stale, or not a good fit. Returns same-shop substitutes and nearby/network matches with storefront URLs; it never reserves, buys, messages, or changes stock.

tools.name: request_shopper_consent
tools.description: Create a short-lived, inert SAGE consent request after showing the shopper a useful result. Returns a consentUrl for the shopper and a private receiptToken for status polling. This does not grant access, reserve anything, contact a store, or authorize payment.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.
